name: amazon-seller-partner
description: Reads Amazon Selling Partner API orders, inventory, finance, catalog, listings, fulfillment, reports, feeds, seller, shipping, vendor, and supporting JSON resources via Login with Amazon (LWA) authentication; exposes declarative writes for SP-API mutations that fit path/body JSON requests.

risk.read: external Amazon Selling Partner API read of order, inventory, and financial data
risk.write: external Amazon Selling Partner API mutations such as feed/report creation, fulfillment, inventory, order, shipping, notification, and vendor workflow actions
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive/cancel/delete actions are marked destructive

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for amazon-seller-partner for LWA refresh_token-grant auth and legacy read parity. Dynamic fixture replay cannot exercise custom LWA auth or write auth because the synthetic token URL is not a real LWA endpoint, so conformance skips auth-dependent read/write replay checks.
